# Bridge AI Solutions

> Bridge AI Solutions is a custom software consultancy that builds AI-powered tools and automations for small B2B service businesses in the United States. We identify your biggest operational bottleneck and build a real solution — handed off so you own the code. We do not build Zapier automations or chatbot templates. We build custom software.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://aibridgedsolutions.com): Overview of services, process, pricing, and FAQ
- [Use Cases](https://aibridgedsolutions.com/use-cases): Industry-specific examples of custom AI tools for consulting, accounting, marketing, recruitment, and construction businesses
- [Pricing](https://aibridgedsolutions.com/pricing): Three engagement tiers — Focused Build ($2,500), Signature Build ($6,000–$8,000), Studio Partner ($2,500/month)
- [Insights](https://aibridgedsolutions.com/insights): Articles on custom AI software, automation decisions, and building for small businesses
- [Start Discovery](https://aibridgedsolutions.com/onboarding): Begin the discovery process with ATLAS, our AI intake assistant

## About

Bridge AI Solutions was founded in 2026 and serves small B2B service businesses across the United States. We specialize in building custom AI-powered tools that replace manual, repetitive operational work — client intake systems, proposal automation, internal knowledge assistants, reporting dashboards, and workflow automation wired to your existing stack.

We are not a no-code automation agency. We do not build Zapier or Make workflows. We write real software: scoped, built, and handed off so the business owns it with no ongoing vendor dependency.

Typical engagements save clients 5–15 hours per week and take 2–6 weeks to complete.

## Founder

Hayden Kerr — founder and developer. Based in the United States.

## What We Build

- Client intake and routing tools
- Proposal and document generation software
- Internal knowledge assistants
- Automated reporting dashboards
- Workflow automation wired to existing business stacks

## Industries Served

- Consulting firms
- Accounting firms
- Marketing agencies
- Recruitment agencies
- Construction businesses

## Articles

- [No-Code Automation vs. Custom AI Software: Which Is Right for Your Business?](https://aibridgedsolutions.com/insights/no-code-vs-custom-ai): Direct comparison of no-code tools (Zapier, Make) vs. custom software — who should use each, with a decision framework.
